turns.user_message: It's so different from how we used to be. I miss the way things felt easy between us.
This distance has been building for months now. I feel like I'm just watching us become strangers.
I look at them and can't even picture the person I fell for anymore. It's like I'm grieving someone who's still here.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be. This has been going on for a while.
